CUSTOMER_WAIT_SEAT: Customer #{{customerId}} is waiting for a seat
ORDER_START_PREPARE: Staff started preparing the order for customer #{{customerId}}
CUSTOMER_ABANDON: Customer #{{customerId}} gave up after waiting too long
STAFF_LITTER_CLEANING: Staff cleans the litter box (1 of 2 daily)

initial.OUT_OF_LOUNGE: {{resourceId}} stays in the cat room and doesn't come out
initial.RESTING: {{resourceId}} settles down to rest from the start
initial.SOCIALIZING: {{resourceId}} starts the day friendly, looking for company
initial.ALERT: {{resourceId}} is on guard from the start
initial.PLAYING: {{resourceId}} starts the day in a playful mood

transition.OUT_OF_LOUNGE: {{resourceId}} has had enough and slips back into the cat room
transition.RESTING: {{resourceId}} finds a quiet spot to settle down
transition.SOCIALIZING: {{resourceId}} perks up and comes over to say hi
transition.HIDDEN: {{resourceId}} gets a bit skittish and tucks itself out of sight
transition.ALERT: {{resourceId}} goes on alert and watches the room
transition.GROOMING: {{resourceId}} sits down for a quick grooming session
transition.EXPLORING: {{resourceId}} gets curious and starts sniffing around
transition.PLAYING: {{resourceId}} is feeling playful and chases something
